summary: Tested Phase 6 Slow Learning implementation (Historical Data Service, Backtest Engine, Shadow Mode Service) and Weekly Report Tab in frontend. All 24 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Weekly Report tab verified with all key sections visible.

slow_learning_status.details: Returns status for all 3 services: historical_data (db_connected, alpaca_connected, symbols_stored, total_bars), backtest_engine (db_connected, backtests_stored), shadow_mode (db_connected, active_filters, total_signals, pending_signals)

historical_download.details: Downloads and stores historical data from Alpaca. Tested with AAPL 30 days.

historical_symbols.details: Returns list of symbols with stored data

historical_stats.details: Returns stats per symbol/timeframe: bar_count, first_bar, last_bar, data_quality

historical_bars.details: Returns stored bars with filtering by timeframe, dates, limit

backtest_run.details: Runs backtest with configurable params. Returns trades, equity_curve, metrics

backtest_results.details: Returns stored backtest results with filtering

backtest_result_by_id.details: Returns specific backtest by ID. 404 for non-existent.

shadow_filter_create.details: Creates new shadow filter with name, description, filter_type, criteria

shadow_filters_get.details: Returns all filters with optional active_only param

shadow_signal_record.details: Records shadow signal with full context (TQS, confirmations, prices)

shadow_signals_get.details: Returns signals with filter_id, status, symbol filtering

shadow_update_outcomes.details: Updates pending signals with current price outcomes

shadow_report.details: Generates shadow mode report with filter performance and recommendations

shadow_filter_validate.details: Validates filter based on signal outcomes

frontend_weekly_report_tab.details: Weekly Report tab accessible via Trade Journal page. Shows Performance Snapshot, Personal Reflection, Report History sidebar, Week navigation.

frontend_verification.weekly_report_tab_visible: PASS - Tab visible in Trade Journal nav
frontend_verification.performance_snapshot: PASS - Shows Total Trades, Win Rate, Total P&L, Profit Factor
frontend_verification.personal_reflection: PASS - Shows Mood, Confidence ratings, What Went Well, What to Improve, Key Lessons, Goals, Notes
frontend_verification.report_history_sidebar: PASS - Shows Week 11, Week 3, Week 2 entries
frontend_verification.week_navigation: PASS - Shows current week with prev/next arrows
frontend_verification.regenerate_button: PASS - Present in top right corner

critical_code_review_comments: All 3 Slow Learning services properly initialized with MongoDB and Alpaca
Historical data download uses chunked fetching for large date ranges
Backtest engine properly calculates win rate, profit factor, R-multiples, drawdown
Shadow mode tracks signal outcomes with would-have P&L calculations
Weekly Report frontend component properly integrated with existing Journal tabs
MongoDB _id properly excluded from all API responses
test_credentials: None required - uses Alpaca from backend .env
seed_data_creation: Test data created: AAPL/SPY historical bars, backtest results, shadow filters and signals
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 6 Slow Learning fully tested. Historical Data Service downloads from Alpaca and stores in MongoDB. Backtest Engine runs simulations with configurable parameters. Shadow Mode tracks paper signals for filter validation. Weekly Report tab accessible at Trade Journal -> Weekly Report. All endpoints working at /api/slow-learning/*
